figures.caption: FIG. 3. Temperature dependence of the inverse local susceptibilities of Fe1,2 (left axis) and Fe3 (right axis) atoms calculated within the DFT+DMFT approach. Dashed lines show the result of extrapolation.

FIG. 2. Frequency dependence of the imaginary parts of the electronic self-energies, corresponding to various d-orbital states at Fe1,2 atoms (circles) and Fe3 atoms (diamonds) calculated within the DFT+DMFT approach at β = 10 eV−1 and U = 2 eV (a), U = 4 eV (b).
FIG. 7. Temperature dependence of the spin wave stiffness within the DFT+DMFT approach for various U . Dashed lines show the result of extrapolation.

FIG. 5. (a) Momentum dependence of inequivalent exchange interactions Jrr′ q between various iron atoms r, r′ = 1..3 and (b) magnon dispersions Ei(q) at β = 10 eV−1 and various values of the on-site Coulomb interaction U .
